chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1543 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case. 29-09-2025 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Narejo, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G and Naheed Akhtar, APG. **** Learned Law Offices file comments on behalf of respondents No.3,4&6, which are taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same submits that since the I.O has submitted 173 CrPC report before the concerned Magistrate; therefore, he will agitate his grievance before the concerned Magistrate; however, for the time being, under instructions, he does not press instant petition, which his accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
